message:
style: rustfmt pass across fr-persist, fr-runtime tests, fr-server

Mechanical rustfmt-only changes across six files. No behavioral change.
Split out as its own commit so reviewers don't sift through whitespace
when inspecting the CLUSTER/ACL/CONNECTION and fuzz commits in the
same batch.

crates/fr-persist/src/lib.rs
  * Test-module `use` blocks alphabetized:
    `use super::{AofRecord, PersistError, decode_aof_stream, …}` and
    the RDB block likewise. No code below the use lines changed.

crates/fr-runtime/tests/noreplicas_test.rs
crates/fr-runtime/tests/stale_replica_test.rs
crates/fr-server/tests/noreplicas_test.rs
crates/fr-server/tests/tcp_e2e_test.rs
  * Long `rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![...])), now_ms)`
    calls that fit on one line under the old rustfmt config now get
    broken across lines by the workspace config — one arg per line
    inside the outer parens.
  * Trailing-whitespace cleanup on empty lines between steps.

crates/fr-server/src/main.rs
  * Same one-arg-per-line reformat for long logging / tracing-init
    calls; no startup-flow change.

Verified: `git diff -w` across this commit is empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,27 +4,39 @@ use fr_runtime::Runtime;
 #[test]
 fn noreplicas_blocks_writes_when_not_enough_replicas() {
     let mut rt = Runtime::default_strict();
-    
+
     // Set min-replicas-to-write to 1
-    rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CONFIG".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"SET".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"min-replicas-to-write".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"1".to_vec())),
-    ])), 0);
-    
+    rt.execute_frame(
+        RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CONFIG".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"SET".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"min-replicas-to-write".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"1".to_vec())),
+        ])),
+        0,
+    );
+
     // Write should be blocked
-    let res = rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"SET".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"foo".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"bar".to_vec())),
-    ])), 1000);
-    assert_eq!(res, RespFrame::Error("NOREPLICAS Not enough good replicas to write.".to_string()));
+    let res = rt.execute_frame(
+        RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"SET".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"foo".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"bar".to_vec())),
+        ])),
+        1000,
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        res,
+        RespFrame::Error("NOREPLICAS Not enough good replicas to write.".to_string())
+    );
 
     // Reads should still be allowed
-    let res = rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"GET".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"foo".to_vec())),
-    ])), 2000);
+    let res = rt.execute_frame(
+        RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"GET".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"foo".to_vec())),
+        ])),
+        2000,
+    );
     assert_eq!(res, RespFrame::BulkString(None));
 }

@@ -4,32 +4,48 @@ use fr_runtime::Runtime;
 #[test]
 fn stale_replica_blocks_reads_when_configured() {
     let mut rt = Runtime::default_strict();
-    
+
     // Configure as a replica
-    rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"REPLICAOF".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"127.0.0.1".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"6379".to_vec())),
-    ])), 0);
-    
+    rt.execute_frame(
+        RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"REPLICAOF".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"127.0.0.1".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"6379".to_vec())),
+        ])),
+        0,
+    );
+
     // Set replica-serve-stale-data to no
-    rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CONFIG".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"SET".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"replica-serve-stale-data".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"no".to_vec())),
-    ])), 100);
-    
+    rt.execute_frame(
+        RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"CONFIG".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"SET".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"replica-serve-stale-data".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"no".to_vec())),
+        ])),
+        100,
+    );
+
     // GET should be blocked (state = connect)
-    let res = rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"GET".to_vec())),
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"foo".to_vec())),
-    ])), 200);
-    assert_eq!(res, RespFrame::Error("MASTERDOWN Link with MASTER is down and replica-serve-stale-data is set to 'no'.".to_string()));
+    let res = rt.execute_frame(
+        RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"GET".to_vec())),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"foo".to_vec())),
+        ])),
+        200,
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        res,
+        RespFrame::Error(
+            "MASTERDOWN Link with MASTER is down and replica-serve-stale-data is set to 'no'."
+                .to_string()
+        )
+    );
 
     // INFO should be allowed
-    let res = rt.execute_frame(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
-        RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"INFO".to_vec())),
-    ])), 300);
+    let res = rt.execute_frame(
+        RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"INFO".to_vec()))])),
+        300,
+    );
     assert!(matches!(res, RespFrame::BulkString(Some(_))));
 }
